title: Device and method of managing user information based on image
abstract: A device and a method of managing user information are provided. The device includes a display and a controller. The controller controls the display to display an avatar-based image according to user schedule information, change the avatar-based image according to a user input indicating a request to change the avatar-based image, and update the user schedule information according to the changed avatar-based image. The method includes displaying, on a display of a device, an avatar-based image according to user schedule information, changing the avatar-based image according to a user input indicating a request to change the avatar-based image, and updating the user schedule information according to the changed avatar-based image.
claims: Claims ( 15 ) A device for managing user information, the device comprising: a display configured to display an avatar-based image; and a controller configured to control the display to display the avatar-based image according to user schedule information, change the avatar-based image according to a user input indicating a request to change the avatar-based image, and update the user schedule information according to the changed avatar-based image. The device of claim 1, further comprising a user input module. The device of claim 2, wherein the user input module is configured to receive a user input requesting user information of a certain period, and the controller is configured to control the display to display a plurality of avatar-based images according to the user information of the certain period in response to the user input, and the plurality of avatar-based images are determined for and correspond respectively to a plurality of different periods comprised by the certain period. The device of claim 2 or 3, wherein the user input module is configured to receive a user input requesting user information of a certain period, and the controller is configured to control the display to display a plurality of avatar-based images according to the user information of the certain period in response to the user input, and the plurality of avatar-based images are determined per theme item included in the user information of the certain period. The device of any of claims 2 to 4, wherein the user input module is configured to receive a user input requesting to display changeable information related to the avatar-based image, and in response to the user input, the controller controls the display to distinguishably display a changeable region and an unchangeable region in the avatar-based image. The device of any preceding claim, wherein the controller is configured to check an offering period that is set for the avatar-based image, and controls the display to not display the avatar-based image when the offering period has expired. The device of any of claims 2 to 6, wherein the controller is configured to control the display to display the avatar-based image according to health information of a user, and the user input module is configured to receive a user input indicating a medical information request, and the controller is configured to control the display to display medical information related to the health information in response to the user input, and upon receiving, through the user input module, a user input about medical information selected based on the displayed medical information, updates the user schedule information according to the selected medical information. The device of any of claims 2 to 7, wherein the user input module is configured to receive a user input indicating information to be added to the avatar-based image, and the controller is configured to control the display to display an input window for receiving an input of the information to be added, add an image corresponding to the information received through the input window to the avatar-based image, and update the user schedule information according to the avatar-based image including the added image. The device of any of claims 2 to 8, wherein the controller is configured to control the display to display the avatar-based image according to future hope information of the user, and the user input module is configured to receive a user input requesting information related to the future hope information, and the controller is configured to control the display to display the information related to the future hope information according to the user input, and updates the user schedule information according to information selected from the information related to the future hope information. The device of any of claims 2 to 9, wherein the controller is configured to control the display to display a plurality of avatar-based images according to usage history information of the device, and the user input module is configured to receive a user input requesting usage history information per usage period of the device, and the controller is configured to control the display to display the plurality of avatar-based images in response to the user input. The device of any of claims 2 to 10, wherein the controller is configured to control the display to display the avatar-based image according to user information registered in social media, and the user input module is configured to receive a user input requesting to change the avatar-based image, and the controller is configured to change the avatar-based image in response to the user input, and updates the user information registered in the social media according to the changed avatar-based image. A method of managing user information, wherein the method is performed by a device, the method comprising: displaying, on a display of the device, an avatar-based image according to user schedule information; changing the avatar-based image according to a user input indicating a request to change the avatar-based image; and updating the user schedule information according to the changed avatar-based image. The method of claim 12, wherein the displaying comprises displaying a plurality of avatar-based images according to user information of a certain period, and wherein the plurality of avatar-based images are determined for and correspond respectively to a plurality of different periods comprised by the certain period. The method of claim 12, wherein the displaying comprises displaying a plurality of avatar-based images according to user information of a certain period, and wherein the plurality of avatar-based images are determined per theme item included in the user information of the certain period. A non-transitory computer readable recording medium having recorded thereon at least one program which includes commands for executing the method of any of claims 12 to 14.
